archimate:Requirement.name: Digital Solution Non-Functional Requirement
archimate:Requirement.documentation:
Definition: The [Digital Solution Non-Functional Requirement] ABB refers to criteria that specify the operational qualities such as performance, security, usability, and reliability of a digital solution, rather than its specific behaviors or functions.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalSolutionNon-FunctionalRequirementRequirement
ABB name: eira:DigitalSolutionNon-FunctionalRequirementRequirement
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalSolutionNon-FunctionalRequirementRequirement
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: The [Digital Solution Non-Functional Requirement] ABB refers to criteria that specify the operational qualities such as performance, security, usability, and reliability of a digital solution, rather than its specific behaviors or functions.
